transcript.text:
[Yongdu-dong's representative food: Jjukkumi (Stir-fried webfoot octopus)]
[There is a specific restaurant that held its ground for 45 years...]
[Honam Restaurant] [Na Jungsoon Halmae Jjukkumi]
[Wrap with kelp noodles?]
[How is it...?]
[Mmm... Mmm?]
[Approved]
[Spicy reaction level 1]
[Spicy reaction level 2]
[Spicy reaction level 3]
[A mukbang full of tears starting now]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Yongdu-dong today
Yongdu-dong is well known for webfoot octopus
[Streets filled with jjukkumi (webfoot octopus restaurants)]
This one is one of the top restaurants in the country

It's very famous I've been wanting to try this place
There's a wait almost every day and it's always crowded So I have not been able to go
I came just in time after their break time
[Over here!]
[Na Jungsoon Halmae Jjukkumi] [Dongdaemun-gu, Yongdu-dong]
Hello
-Hello~! -Yes, hello
Up to how many servings can I fit on this grill?
-4 servings -Is it possible to fit more?
-Maybe 5 servings -How about 6?
-You have a party of 6? -No, just me
By yourself?
I'll just do 7 servings for now
I'll split them into 3 grills (3, 2, 2 servings) so it doesn't overflow]
-Is it spicy? -Yes
-Really spicy? -Not too spicy

I might not be able to eat too much because of the spiciness
so I only ordered a little bit
I'm not here to eat a lot today
I'm just here to try out this famous place
I will to-go the leftovers if it's too spicy for me
[It's coming...]
Will you be able to eat it?
Yes I can, but is it that spicy?
[This is 7 servings...?]
We're very busy
Even in the morning
1000 customers on busy days
This alone is 3 servings?
The portions are huge
That's a lot Doesn't look like 3 servings
The proper way to eat this is to use the backside of the perilla leaf

and eat it with the kelp noodles
You can also add garlic if you'd like
Thank you~
This is cooked on a cauldron grill pan
This is 3 servings? It's a lot...
350g for 1 serving
So over 1kg for 3 servings? That's a lot
Stir-fried webfoot octopus usually have a lot of veggies
But this is all octopus
All webfoot octopus and mushrooms I've never seen anything like this
-Would you like an apron? -It's okay! My shirt works as an apron
It looks great I'm so curious
Bon appetit
She told me how to eat this, but
I'll take a normal bite first
Delicious~!

Wow, it's spicy
The spiciness kicks in right away
It has a numbing flavor
It's a flavor that relieves stress
It's a little sweet at first
So...
It has a good balance of sweetness and saltiness
Let's make the wrap now I don't really like kelp noodles
I wonder how it is
I wonder if kelp noodles will go well with it
It's tasty
I'm not a fan of kelp noodles
But it doesn't feel like it
Also,
Is this mayonnaise?
It balances it out

But it's really spicy
The kelp noodles are not bad at all!
It's good!
It's just octopus and mushrooms Nothing else
Mushroom
It's yummy!
Webfoot octopus tend to get tough to chew when cooked for long
But it's still very tender
Webfoot octopus~
On top!
With kelp noodles
It's a good amount of spiciness to relieve stress
It's still manageable
[Are you sure...?]
Here's some plum juice, I'm a fan
Thank you

Wow, thank you!
[More?]
The owner gave me some beverages
They gave me some mayonnaise because I'm not good with spicy foods
Can I use this much?
I'll buy them a new one before I leave
I love dipping webfoot octopus in mayo
Dip it right in
Why's this piece so big?
This mushroom
Shiitake mushroom
On top
With garlic
And mayo
[Gather in 1 place]
Mixed octopus

It looks strange, but it will be good
I'm happy
Why do my eyes get smaller when it's hot and spicy?
Just like this
Mayonnaise mixed octopus Why don't they have that on the menu?
[That would be way too many calories]
[Spicy spicy!]
[For the next grill]
I want to watch you eat, but the store is busy
[Additional 2 servings] How are these 2 servings? That's a lot of food!
Start eating from this side as it cooks
There's a reason why you use the back-side of the leaf, but I forgot
[It's so that it's easier to swallow with the soft surface]
So good
How is it still so tender?
Come here!

You're mine
There's sweat on my philtrum
Are you filming that?!
The color looks crazy
[Scoop out the cooked octopus...]
It's starting to get really spicy
It's not that I'm bad with spicy food Anyone would be like this when they eat this much
This is really spicy, sweet, and salty With strong flavors
But it's just so good
Should be ready, right?
I'm going to eat it anyway
Help me
It's a good kind of spicy!
That's not easy to do
[You make me cry...]
I cry sometimes...

Can you eat more? Should I bring it in?
Yes, please
[Last plate of 2 servings]
Why are they called jjukumi?
There's a reason why I don't need an apron
My sleeves won't be covered
It gets on parts where aprons don't cover
[And you always wear white...]
I'm an octopus...
[Sorry to interrupt your singing, but...]
[I'm a webfoot octopus... -_-]
This last plate looks amazing
The more it gets cooked,
All the redness is cooked up
Looks like it's from hell
Excuse me,

Fried rice, please
So many of you guys were mad that I didn't eat fried rice with the spicy chicken & octopus mukbang...
There were so many comments about it!
[Uploaded on 2022.01.25
I just couldn't because the restaurant got really crowded
But I will today!
[Scoop them out to mix it with rice later]
Thank you!
[It comes out with delicious soybean stew]
Thank you
I don't really like eating fried rice,
so there are a lot of times I skip out on this
But this looks tasty
Soybean stew with it too
I don't have time for this
I need to eat the fried rice

Give me 1 bite!
[Hot!]
It's very hot and very tasty
Let's get some rice
That's spicy
But I have mayo with me!
Mayonnaise!
I haven't made a giant wrap yet
It's starting to get crowded
I need to hurry up and leave
Get everything in 1 wrap!
All goes in!
Mayo
A lot
Possible, right?
[The spiciness seems impossible...]

Some fried rice!
Stack it!
[Reverse]
Put it back on
[Drink the bev]
[Squeeze out the mayo]
[Eat...]
[Drink...]
[Eat...]
[Drink...]
I can do it!
[Is this a mayonnaise wrap...?]
There's no other way because it's too spicy for me
Once more!
This is it
[Fried rice scraping off with ease...]

Get some with the rice like this
I love it!
Was I eating without saying anything?
I was so focused
I will make a verdict on the spiciness
Eating 1 serving of it was not spicy
It's similar to Teumsae Ramyun noodles' spiciness
Last bite with perilla leaf
Thanks everyone~
[Paying for the bill...] -Please include the bottle of mayonnaise -No no no
We just can't do that
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
